allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8123/index.html" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; "BYTES: $\($r.RawContentLength\)"; if \($r.Content -match 'id="calGrid"'\) { "calGrid: present" }; if \($r.Content -match 'id="searchInput"'\) { "searchInput: present" } } catch { "ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
